tasks.subject: Dev data isolation — version-driven app_dir_name()
acceptanceCriteria: dir_name_for("1.6.1") returns sts2-mod-manager
dir_name_for("1.6.1-dev.pr42.ga1b2c3d") returns sts2-mod-manager-dev
config_path and cache_path in state.rs use app_dir_name()
lib.rs logging dir uses crate::state::app_dir_name()
STS2_CONFIG_DIR/STS2_CACHE_DIR overrides still take precedence
cargo test passes including the two new tests

tasks.subject: dev-build-stamp.mjs — version compute, file stamp, comment render
acceptanceCriteria: computeDevVersion('1.6.1','42','a1b2c3d') -> 1.6.1-dev.pr42.ga1b2c3d
all-digit sha 0123456 -> g0123456 (valid SemVer)
stampFiles rewrites version+identifier+productName in conf and [package] version in Cargo, nothing else
renderDevComment includes marker, metadata, every asset, isolation note; empty assets -> no-artifacts line
--stamp reads base from tauri.conf.json, requires DEV_PR_NUMBER+DEV_SHORT_SHA, prints stamped version
module importable without running main
no silent-skip patterns; every test asserts

tasks.commit: cd330ea + fix b60d9bc (added labeled trigger + gate guards)
tasks.subject: build.yml — labeled-PR gate + stamp step + dev portable + artifact paths
acceptanceCriteria: build gate fires for pull_request with dev-build label; tag+dispatch unchanged
Stamp dev version step runs before Build Tauri app, labeled-PR only, via dev-build-stamp.mjs --stamp
dev-only Windows portable step produces root STS2.Mod.Manager_<ver>_x64_portable.zip with no gh release upload
Upload build artifacts paths include root *_x64_portable.zip
build.yml parses as valid YAML
release/tag path byte-unchanged

tasks.commit: 87fcdbc + fix 68ce319 (hardened: partial-success gate, empty-dist guard, graceful no-artifacts)
tasks.subject: build.yml — publish-dev job (rolling prerelease + sticky comment)
acceptanceCriteria: new publish-dev job needs:build, labeled-PR only
downloads all binaries-* artifacts
creates-or-updates prerelease tag dev-pr<N> with --prerelease, replacing assets
upserts sticky PR comment found by <!-- dev-build-comment --> via renderDevComment
permissions contents:write + pull-requests:write
build.yml parses as valid YAML

tasks.subject: dev-build-cleanup.yml — delete dev prerelease on PR close
acceptanceCriteria: triggers on pull_request types:[closed]
deletes release dev-pr<N> + tag, idempotent
permissions contents:write
YAML parses

tasks.subject: Create dev-build label + end-to-end verification (USER GATE)
tasks.verifyCommand: gh release view dev-pr<N> --repo MohamedSerhan/sts2-mod-manager --json assets --jq '.assets[].name'
acceptanceCriteria: dev-build label exists (gh label list)
throwaway PR labeled dev-build produces dev-pr<N> prerelease with Win+macOS+Linux assets
PR has sticky comment containing <!-- dev-build-comment --> + per-platform links
downloaded Windows portable build writes …/sts2-mod-manager-dev/ NOT release sts2-mod-manager/ — maintainer-confirmed
closing the PR deletes the dev-pr<N> prerelease (gh release view -> not found)
